tasks.title: Classify Miyabi-origin capabilities into absorb / bridge / non-target with explicit rationale
Restore a living planning artifact layer equivalent to Miyabi Plans.md on top of the current planning/runtime artifacts
Replace .ai/worktrees staging-only behavior with real git worktree create/reuse/cleanup lifecycle management
Evolve review from configured one-shot checks to an iterative review loop with explicit handoff and escalation
Introduce an independent TestAgent runtime instead of keeping test execution absorbed inside ReviewAgent
Add a repo-local Water Spider continuity layer without importing tmux or multi-machine infrastructure wholesale
Stage Omega absorption by adding intent/understanding and strategic-plan layers ahead of the current decomposition runtime
Stage Omega integration and learning artifacts after the current execution/runtime layer
Revalidate that context-and-impact, agent-skill-bus, gitnexus-stable-ops, and optional Miyabi CLI/MCP remain narrow bridges rather than hidden runtime dependencies
Expand smoke, CI, and runtime docs so the parity targets stay truthful and continuously verifiable
